jobs.title: Founding Backend Software Engineer
jobs.reasoning: Strong match. The candidate’s listed skills align almost exactly with the job requirements: TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, GCP, Docker, GraphQL, RAG, LLM, and LangChain are all present. This is an unusually high keyword and stack fit for the role. The main gap is seniority: the role is for a Founding Backend Software Engineer, which typically implies strong ownership, architecture, and end-to-end product responsibility in an early-stage environment, while the candidate is marked as junior. That lowers confidence on autonomy, system design depth, and ability to operate at founding-level scope. Still, from a technology-fit perspective, the profile is excellent.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.reasoning: Strong match on the core backend stack: TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, GCP, Docker, GraphQL, RAG, LLM, and LangChain are all present in the profile and align well with the job requirements. Main gap is that the job description explicitly mentions 2-3 years experience and programming in one of Java, C++, C#, Python, Go, or Perl; the profile is marked junior and does not list Java or Python explicitly. Overall, excellent technical stack alignment but somewhat weaker match on seniority/experience and listed primary languages from the description.
